title: Raki Kazuki HUD & GUI
description: A fan-driven HUD and GUI overhaul themed around PixelLink's 1st Generation VTuber, Raki Kazuki! Rah!
body:
# Raki Kazuki HUD & GUI Pack
This [Raki Kazuki](https://www.youtube.com/@RakiKazuki) Resource Pack is an UNOFFICIAL and FANMADE PixelLink project, produced by [Jellis (me)](https://x.com/Jellis_X) which overhauls most, if not all graphical interfaces! It is themed around this raccoon-witch and all of her witchy aesthetic!

Everything from me is made completely from scratch (asides the Main Menu Background). 

# Installation Guide
After choosing a version from this project page, you should be left with a ``.zip`` file. Do not unzip it. Navigate to your _resource packs_ folder which can be found in the settings with:

**[ESC] -> "Options..." -> "Resource Packs..." -> "Open Pack Folder..."**

which should open a folder in File Explorer. From there drag in your ``PXL_RAKI_x.xx.zip`` file, and your screen should have the following:

![After dragging in the downloaded resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51122919e780a8b386af30f1a56c8596f567ffb1.png)

Hover your mouse on the pack icon and click on the **arrow**, and click "Done" to enable the mod pack. And you are done, congrats!

This is the standard way of applying resource packs into your game. There are no other _requirements_ necessary to make this resource pack run. 

# Credits
### Design Inspiration
Raki Kazuki ([YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@RakiKazuki))

### Main Menu Background Render
Darrick966 ([X](https://x.com/Darrick966))
